story: How much does a World Cup referee make? Salary details and more for 2026 FIFA final officials - Yahoo Sports
title: World Cup Referee Salary
script: Referees make fifty thousand dollars per match. This matters because it's a relatively small sum compared to what FIFA generates from the World Cup, with billions of dollars in revenue. The financial winners and losers are already being tallied, with some teams and officials reaping huge benefits. As the final match approaches, the referee's salary is just one part of a much larger financial picture, raising questions about fairness and equality. What will be the lasting impact of this disparity on the sport and its future?
